allow: Bash(New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path self-healing-contracts/contracts/proxy, self-healing-contracts/contracts/interfaces, self-healing-contracts/agents, self-healing-contracts/graph, self-healing-contracts/core, self-healing-contracts/deploy, self-healing-contracts/api, self-healing-contracts/dashboard, self-healing-contracts/tests, self-healing-contracts/scripts)
Bash(python -c "import langchain, langgraph, chromadb, web3, redis; print\('ALL IMPORTS OK'\)")
Bash(python -m pytest tests/test_phase1.py tests/test_phase2.py tests/test_phase3.py tests/test_phase4.py -v --tb=short)
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('bytecode length:', len\(d.get\('bytecode',''\)\)\); print\('has deployedBytecode:', bool\(d.get\('deployedBytecode'\)\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('bytecode length:', len\(d.get\('bytecode',''\)\)\); abi=d.get\('abi',[]\); ctors=[x for x in abi if x.get\('type'\)=='constructor']; print\('constructor inputs:', ctors[0].get\('inputs'\) if ctors else 'none'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); abi=d.get\('abi',[]\); fns=[x for x in abi if x.get\('type'\)=='function']; [print\(f['name'], ':', [i['name'] for i in f.get\('inputs',[]\)]\) for f in fns]")
